growth_picks.analyst_take: ORCL scores 5.5/6 with revenue growth accelerating to 21.7%, operating margins at 33%, and ROE at 58%, yet trades 49% below 52w high with forward PE of 22 and a target mean implying 39% upside. The negative FCF is a feature not a bug - it is the AI capex cycle the thesis depends on. Strongest analyst consensus in the group (1.63) and largest drawdown combine for a BUY.
